name: Spaghetti Squash & Zucchini Casserole`
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon Garlic Powder, or 2 cloves fresh
recipeInstructions:
(This dish requires 20 minutes of baking. The preparation of the spaghetti squash can be done stovetop or in a microwave.)
1. Cut spaghetti squash in half length-wise. Carefully scrape out seeds, but do not cut into the body of the squash.
2. While the squash is cooking, prepare other ingredients:
- Stovetop: Place half squash cut side down in a pot with 2 inches (5 cm) water, cover and boil for 20 minutes.
- Microwave: Place half squash in a dish with 1/4 cup water, cover with plastic wrap and cook at high (>600 watts) for 7 minutes.
3. Once the squash is partially cooked, use a fork to scrape out the strands, leaving a thin, hard shell.
4. In a large bowl, combine spaghetti squash, tomato sauce, grated zucchini, and spices. Mix well and spoon into the squash shell or casserole dish.
5. Top with nutritional yeast, additional garlic powder (and, if desired, non-fat grated parmesan cheese).
6. Bake at 350 degrees F. (175 C.) for 20 minutes or until done.
7. Serves 6. Each 8 oz (.25 l.) serving has 66 calories and less than 0.25 grams of fat.
